title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sunteck Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sunteck Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sunteck Realty. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
